title: Active-dendrite reduced neuron models toward the CA1 interneuron working point

slides.topic: Reduction limit: passive dendrites can't spike through the shunt
Fix strategy: dendritic regenerative Na/K current
user_m4 result: Bistratified recruited, PV/O_LM not
Why PV fails: domain-average V_d can't distinguish local vs uniform
user_m5: branch-local active voltage per domain
Full model stack: user_m2->m3->m4->m5 + corrections -> theta
